name: the persisted options-view is byte-identical across runs when no rule has changed
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/config-sync.sh" --persist --out view.yaml 2>/dev/null; cp view.yaml a.yaml; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/config-sync.sh" --persist --out view.yaml 2>/dev/null; diff -q a.yaml view.yaml >/dev/null && echo view-byte-identical 1>&2
